cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. There are five people on a soccer team: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. At the start of the match, their positions are assigned as follows: - Alice: right winger - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: left winger - Dave: cheerleader - Eve: goalkeeper Then, there are several swaps. Let me track each swap step by step. First, Dave and Bob trade positions. So initially, Dave is a cheerleader and Bob is a right midfielder. After swapping, Dave becomes the right midfielder and Bob becomes the cheerleader. Second, Dave and Eve trade positions. Now, Dave was the right midfielder, and Eve is the goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes the goalkeeper and Eve becomes the right midfielder. Third, Alice and Bob trade positions. At this point, Alice is the right winger and Bob is the cheerleader. After swapping, Alice becomes the cheerleader and Bob becomes the right winger. Fourth, Dave and Claire trade positions. Dave is currently the goalkeeper, and Claire is the left winger. After swapping, Dave becomes the left winger and Claire becomes the goalkeeper. Fifth, Dave and Eve trade positions
